## What this does

Describe what changed and why in one to three sentences.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Test coverage
- [ ] Dependency update
- [ ] Security fix

## How to test

1. Describe setup.
2. Run validation steps.
3. Confirm expected behavior.

```bash
./simulate.sh --help
./simulate.sh mimikatz --dry-run
```

## Security checklist

- [ ] Signature handling is not weakened
- [ ] No secrets are hardcoded or logged
- [ ] Redaction and test safety constraints are preserved

## Breaking changes

State whether this changes payload shape, flags, or output contracts.
